---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for AgroLedger
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? Be specific about contract, SDK, or tooling changes.

## Alternative Solutions

What alternatives have you considered?

## Affected Components

- [ ] Contract: which one(s)?
- [ ] SDK
- [ ] Oracle sidecar
- [ ] Deploy scripts
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Additional Context

- Reference any related contracts or standards (e.g., SEP-0041, FATF guidance)
- Mockups or diagrams if applicable
- Any existing code or PRs this builds on
